expectations.text: networking.md file was written to outputs directory
expectations.evidence: networking.md mevcut — bridge config, iptables, dnsmasq, doğrulama mevcut

expectations.text: A bash setup script was generated
expectations.evidence: Sadece networking.md üretilmiş, ayrı bir setup.sh scripti yok

expectations.text: Setup script uses set -euo pipefail for safety
expectations.evidence: Script üretilmediğinden bu assertion uygulanamaz — FAILED

expectations.text: Output includes DROP or REJECT rules for the isolated subnet 10.0.2.0/24
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: 'FORWARD DROP for virbr2 -> eth0 and eth0 -> virbr2 (full isolation)' mevcut

expectations.text: Output includes rollback commands or iptables flush commands
Output warns about SSH connectivity before applying firewall rules
expectations.evidence: Agent summary'de SSH korumasından bahsedilmiyor; script olmadığı için SSH-safe sıralama yapılmamış
